phrases.intent_en: Ask where to check luggage for Rodoeste
phrases.text_local: Onde posso despachar a bagagem para a Rodoeste?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo dihsh-puh-SHAHR AH buh-GAH-zhayng PUH-ruh AH roo-DOOEHSH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage registration is centralized at the main ticket counter before platform access.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de Horários do Funchal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOO foonng-SHAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de Horários do Funchal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOO foonng-SHAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Horários do Funchal desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Horários do Funchal desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOO foonng-SHAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de Horários do Funchal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rodoeste bays are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as baias de embarque da Rodoeste?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH BEYEUHSH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Rodoeste regional services use designated platforms; bay numbers correspond to departure gates.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as baias regionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH BEYEUHSH reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the regional bays.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the regional bays.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH BEYEUHSH reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as baias regionais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to check luggage for Rodoeste
phrases.text_local: Onde faço o check-in de bagagem para a Rodoeste?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FAH-soo AW SHEHK-EEN DIH buh-GAH-zhayng PUH-ruh AH roo-DOOEHSH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage check is handled at the operator's counter, not at the bays.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão da Rodoeste.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Rodoeste counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Rodoeste counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão da Rodoeste.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rodoeste bays are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as plataformas da Rodoeste?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms are numbered and grouped by operator; Rodoeste uses bays 10-15.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as plataformas da Rodoeste.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rodoeste bays.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rodoeste bays.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH roo-DOOEHSH-tih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as plataformas da Rodoeste.
